name: babel
description: Static source for alexnava.me, a portfolio site with a Three.js scene.
osps_ac_02_01_justification: GitHub collaborators and teams are granted permissions explicitly, with elevated access assigned manually. Repository: https://github.com/alxnva/babel
osps_ac_03_01_justification: The main branch is protected to require pull requests and block direct pushes. Repository: https://github.com/alxnva/babel
osps_ac_03_02_justification: The main branch is protected against deletion. Repository: https://github.com/alxnva/babel
osps_br_01_01_justification: The CI workflow runs fixed npm commands and does not interpolate branch names, pull request titles, or commit messages into shell commands. Workflow: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/.github/workflows/ci.yml
osps_br_01_03_justification: The CI workflow uses read-only contents permission and does not expose secrets to pull_request runs. Workflow: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/.github/workflows/ci.yml
osps_br_03_01_justification: Official project channels use HTTPS, including the project website and source repository. README: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/README.md
osps_br_03_02_justification: The official distribution channel is https://alexnava.me and deployed assets are delivered over HTTPS via Cloudflare Pages. Project website: https://alexnava.me
osps_br_07_01_justification: The repository ignores local build output and dependency directories, and GitHub secret scanning plus push protection are enabled. Git ignore: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/.gitignore
osps_do_01_01_justification: The README explains the project, local development flow, build commands, and deployment basics. README: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/README.md
osps_do_02_01_justification: Bug reporting guidance is documented in README.md and CONTRIBUTING.md, using GitHub Issues as the default tracker. CONTRIBUTING: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
osps_gv_02_01_justification: Public discussion and usage questions are handled through GitHub Issues. Issues: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/issues
osps_gv_03_01_justification: The contribution process is documented in CONTRIBUTING.md. CONTRIBUTING: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
osps_le_02_01_justification: The source code is released under the MIT License. LICENSE: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/LICENSE
osps_le_02_02_justification: Released site assets are covered by the MIT License. LICENSE: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/LICENSE
osps_le_03_01_justification: The repository contains a top-level LICENSE file. LICENSE: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/LICENSE
osps_le_03_02_justification: The build copies LICENSE into dist so released assets ship alongside the license text. Build script: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/build.mjs
osps_qa_01_01_justification: The authoritative source repository is publicly readable at a stable URL. Repository: https://github.com/alxnva/babel
osps_qa_01_02_justification: The Git repository exposes a public commit history showing who changed what and when. Commits: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/commits/main
osps_qa_02_01_justification: Direct dependencies are declared in package.json and package-lock.json. package.json: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/package.json
osps_qa_04_01_justification: babel is maintained as a single authoritative code repository.
osps_qa_05_01_justification: Generated deploy output is kept in ignored dist/ and generated scripts or vendored runtime files are not tracked in version control. Git ignore: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/.gitignore
osps_qa_05_02_justification: The repository does not track executable binaries or prebuilt library artifacts; the tracked binary files are static font assets. Repository tree: https://github.com/alxnva/babel
osps_vm_02_01_justification: Security contacts and reporting instructions are documented in SECURITY.md. SECURITY: https://github.com/alxnva/babel/blob/main/SECURITY.md
